message:
feat(cron): migrate cron connector to FcpConnector trait (FCP3 execution model)

Pilot migration for P4.4: the cron connector now implements the
FcpConnector trait from fcp-core, establishing the pattern for
migrating remaining connector families.

Changes:
- Add FcpConnector trait impl with all required methods (configure,
  handshake, health, self_check, metrics, shutdown, introspect,
  invoke, simulate, subscribe, unsubscribe)
- Add CapabilityVerifier to handshake for proper capability chain
- Update main.rs to dispatch via trait methods where possible,
  falling back to handle_* for mutable operations (create/delete/trigger)
- Add read-only invoke helpers for trait's &self invoke signature
- Add async-trait dependency

All 215 tests pass (169 lib + 46 integration). No compatibility
wrappers — the trait impl coexists with the existing handle_* methods
as the migration reference pattern.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
